title: Job Opening Teacher at Navneet Education

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Navneet Education
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navneet Education. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Navneet Education:
Navneet Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education!
